name: HMS Grasshopper (T 85)
events: 21 May 1940 HMS Grasshopper (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) R.H. Aldworth, RN) is docked in the floating dock at the Singapore Dockyard. (1)

10 Jul 1940 HMS Danae (Capt. A.C. Collinson, RN) and HMS Dauntless (Capt. G.D. Moore, RAN), HMS Stronghold (Lt.Cdr. R. Alexander, RN), HMS Grasshopper (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) R.H. Aldworth, RN) and HMS Regent (Lt.Cdr. H.C. Browne, RN) all conducted exercises off Singapore. (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
